title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 02 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 02 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 02 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 02/04/2024
DCE iron ore futures market rose by 3.09% . The main contract I2409 closed at 768; Traders ship according to market conditions；steel mills purchased on demand. Today the overall market transaction atmosphere is acceptable.
